title: How do I access Student/Employee Hub resources?
plain_text: Services and links from the myNortheastern portal have been moved to the Student/Employee Hub. Most of these resources are available on the Hub's Resources page, though some may exist in other areas of the Hub, depending on your role and attributes. For additional information about the Student Hub and its features, visit the Student/Employee Hub information page. Access resources 1. Log in to the to the Student/Employee Hub. 2. Select Resources from the navigation menu. 3. Select a category to view relevant services and links.
body_html:
Services and links from the myNortheastern portal have been moved to the Student/Employee Hub. Most of these resources are available on the Hub's Resources page, though some may exist in other areas of the Hub, depending on your role and attributes. For additional information about the Student Hub and its features, visit the Student/Employee Hub information page.

Access resources

  • Log in to the to the Student/Employee Hub.
  • Select Resources from the navigation menu.
  • Select a category to view relevant services and links.

For additional information about the Student Hub and its features, visit the Student/Employee Hub information page.

steps: Log in to the to the Student/Employee Hub.
Select Resources from the navigation menu.
Select a category to view relevant services and links.
